title: MoreToolTexture
description:
MoreToolTexture resource-pack Needs  Any ToolCrafting datapack,
the ToolCrafting datapacks make all tools craftable with bones, bamboos, blaze-rods, breeze-rods, amethyst-shards and echo-shards.
body:
## MoreToolTexture

This resource pack adds custom textures for all the:

Bone tools and items introduced by the BoneToolCrafting datapack!
Bamboo tools and items introduced by the BambooToolCrafting datapack!
Blaze-Rod tools and items introduced by the BlazeToolCrafting datapack!
Breeze-Rod tools and items introduced by the BreezeToolCrafting datapack!
Amethyst-Shard tools and items introduced by the AmethystToolCrafting datapack!
Echo-Shard tools and items introduced by the EchoToolCrafting datapack!


 With these packs, your newly crafted tools will have a distinct, polished appearance, making them feel like a true addition to your world.

---

### Hard Dependency

This resource pack is designed to work exclusively with the 6 datapacks above. It provides textures for the custom items added by that packs and will not function as intended without it.

[**Get the BoneToolCrafting Datapack Here!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Bonetoolcrafting)
[**Get the BambooToolCrafting Datapack Here!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Bambootoolcrafting)
[**Get the BlazeToolCrafting Datapack Here!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Blazetoolcrafting)
[**Get the BreezeToolCrafting Datapack Here!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Breezetoolcrafting)
[**Get the AmethystToolCrafting Datapack Here!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Amethysttoolcrafting)
[**Get the EchoToolCrafting Datapack Here!**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/Echotoolcrafting)

---

### New Textures Included:

* **Tools:** 
    * Copper Axe
    * Copper Hoe
    * Copper Pickaxe
    * Copper Shovel
    * Copper Sword
    * Diamond Axe
    * Diamond Hoe
    * Diamond Pickaxe
    * Diamond Shovel
    * Diamond Sword
    * Iron Axe
    * Iron Hoe
    * Iron Pickaxe
    * Iron Shovel
    * Iron Sword
    * Golden Axe
    * Golden Hoe
    * Golden Pickaxe
    * Golden Shovel
    * Golden Sword
    * Stone Axe
    * Stone Hoe
    * Stone Pickaxe
    * Stone Shovel
    * Stone Sword
    * Wooden Axe
    * Wooden Hoe
    * Wooden Pickaxe
    * Wooden Shovel
    * Wooden Sword
    * Bow
    * Fishing Rod
    * Carrot on a Stick
    * Warped Fungus on a Stick
    * Brush
